error.teacher_advice_ch: 要解出這道題目，可以先將兩台機器的生產數量假設為未知數，p makes x sprockets per hour . then q makes 1.1 x sprockets per hour . 770 / x = 770 / (1.1 x) + 10 ，1.1 ( 770 ) = 770 + 11 x ，11 x = 77 ，x = 7
error.teacher_advice_en:
To solve this problem, you can start by assuming the production rates of the two machines as unknown variables. Let's say machine P makes x sprockets per hour. Then machine Q makes 1.1 x sprockets per hour. Since both machines produce 770 sprockets, we can set up the following equation:

770 / x = 770 / (1.1 x) + 10

Simplifying this equation, we get:

1.1 ( 770 ) = 770 + 11 x
11 x = 77
x = 7

Therefore, machine P produces 7 sprockets per hour.

In the sport formula the ratio of flavoring to corn syrup is $\frac{1}{12} \times 3=\frac{1}{4}$ the ratio of flavoring to water is $\frac{1}{30} \div 2=\frac{1}{60}$ $7 \div 4 \times 60=105$ ounces
assume there are $x$ attendants. $$ \begin{aligned} 1+2+3+\ldots+(x-1) & =190 \\ \frac{(x-1)[1+(x-1)]}{2} & =190 \\ x(x-1) & =380 \\ x & =20 \# \end{aligned} $$
assume the total votes are $x$. $$ \begin{aligned} {[60 \%-(1-60 \%)] x } & =280 \\ 0.2 x & =280 \\ x & =1400 \end{aligned} $$
There are $10+(8-1) x^2=24$ desks at the last row. $$ \frac{8(10+24)}{2}=4 \times 34=136 $$

error.teacher_advice_ch: if it takes 4 more minutes for a to print 40 pages than it takes b , it takes 5 more minutes for a to print 50 pages than it takes b . thus if b is the number of minutes than b takes to print 50 pages , we can write : 1 / b + 1 / ( b + 5 ) = 1 / 6 ( since in 1 minute , they print 1 / 6 th of the 50 page job ) 6 ( 2 b + 5 ) = b ( b + 5 ) b ^ 2 - 7 b - 30 = 0 ( b - 10 ) ( b + 3 ) = 0，解出b後即可計算出答案
error.teacher_advice_en: If it takes Printer A 4 more minutes to print 40 pages than it takes Printer B, it will take Printer A 5 more minutes to print 50 pages than it takes Printer B. Let’s denote the number of minutes Printer B takes to print 50 pages as b. We can then write the equation: 1/b + 1/(b + 5) = 1/6 (since together they print 1/6th of the 50-page job in one minute). Simplifying this gives 6(2b + 5) = b(b + 5) which leads to the quadratic equation b^2 - 7b - 30 = 0. Solving (b - 10)(b + 3) = 0, we can find the value of b and subsequently calculate the answer.
